info.name: API Gateway - Complete Collection
info.description: Colección completa de endpoints del API Gateway. Incluye todas las rutas organizadas por módulos.

query.description: Single day (YYYY-MM-DD). Use this OR from/to for date range.

request.description: Unified endpoint for productivity metrics. Returns consolidated metrics and optionally per-agent metrics. For single agent contractors, only 'consolidated' is returned. For multi-agent contractors, both 'consolidated' and 'agents' are returned.

query.description: ID del agente. Sin enviar: vista consolidada (una fila por sesión). Con agentId: solo sesiones de ese agente.

request.description: Resúmenes de sesión del contractor. Sin agentId: consolidado (una fila por session_id). Con agentId: solo sesiones de ese agente.

query.description: ID del agente. Sin enviar: consolidado. Con agentId: solo sesiones de ese agente.

request.description: Sesiones agrupadas por día. Sin agentId: consolidado. Con agentId: solo ese agente.
Requires Superadmin role. DELETE + INSERT (hard backfill)
Requires Superadmin role. DELETE + INSERT (hard backfill)
Requires Superadmin or TeamAdmin role. 'dates' es un array de fechas (YYYY-MM-DD).

item.name: Get Contractor Day Off by ID

request.description: Requires Superadmin or TeamAdmin role. Puede actualizar 'dates' (array) y/o 'reason'.

item.name: Get Active Session by Contractor ID
Get Agent Sessions by Agent ID
Get Active Session by Agent ID
Get Agent Sessions by Contractor ID
Get Events by Agent Session ID

request.description: Public. Registers an agent without contractor key. Backend creates an unassigned agent and returns agent_id and activation_key. Body: hostname (optional). Response: { agent_id, activation_key }. Throttled.

Requires Superadmin or TeamAdmin. Links an unassigned agent to a contractor using the agent's activation_key. First agent for that contractor becomes HOST; additional agents become VM with parent. Body: { activation_key, contractorId }. Response: { agent_id, contractor_id, type, parent_agent_id? }.
Public. Sends heartbeat for a linked agent. Body: agentId.
Requires Superadmin or TeamAdmin. Swaps HOST/VM types between two agents of the same contractor. Body: agent1_id, agent2_id.
Generates a productivity report in PDF format. Returns S3 URL.
